title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.530
text:
*478.530.  Court may make rules for distribution, transfer of cases. — The circuit judges of circuit number twenty-nine may make such rules as may be found necessary for the proper distribution of cases for trial and disposition among the several divisions of the court presided over by circuit or associate circuit judges and the transfer of cases to and from such divisions, including divisions at Carthage and at Joplin.  Such authority is in addition to the authority set forth in section 478.245.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79 
*Formerly 478.537.
